title: Christmas Novelty Sunglasses Party Specs – Assorted Festive Designs, One Size Fits All, Fun Xmas Dress Up, Durable Plastic or Felt with Glitter Finish

amazon_product_details_section.Best Sellers Rank: 88,977 in Toys & Games (See Top 100 in Toys & Games) 306 in Kids' Party Eyewear

description: Product description Add a touch of festive fun to your celebrations with these Christmas Novelty Party Glasses, the perfect accessory for holiday parties, family gatherings, office events, Christmas photos, and fancy dress occasions. These playful glasses come in an assortment of cheerful and amusing seasonal designs, including Santa hats, reindeer antlers, sparkling snowflakes, Christmas trees, glitter bows, holly accents, and more. Each pair is carefully styled to bring humor, joy, and personality to your holiday look, making them a delightful addition to any festive outfit. Designed in a one size fits all format, these party specs are comfortable and lightweight, making them easy to wear for both adults and teens. Crafted from durable plastic or soft felt materials, depending on the style, each pair features a bright, eye-catching glitter finish that shines beautifully under party lights, adding the perfect touch of holiday sparkle. The frames are shaped to sit securely and naturally on most face shapes, ensuring they stay in place while you mingle, dance, pose for selfies, or participate in holiday games and events. These glasses are ideal for anyone looking to elevate their Christmas spirit. Whether you're preparing for a themed celebration, putting together a fun holiday costume, participating in a Christmas photo booth, or handing out playful accessories at a seasonal event, these novelty glasses are sure to bring smiles and laughter. They also make great stocking fillers, Secret Santa gifts, or festive party favors for guests to enjoy and take home. Please note that these glasses are designed for decorative and costume purposes. They are not sunglasses and do not provide UV or vision protection. Their primary purpose is fun, entertainment, and enhancing your festive appearance. Celebrate the season in style and create joyful memories with these charming and cheerful Christmas Novelty Glasses! Safety Warning Keep away from heat sources and open flames. Not a toy. Not recommended for children under 14 years due to small parts and breakage risk.
